properties.remark: REPORTED BY TV METEOROLOGIST NEAR THE CASPER-NATRONA COUNTY INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT.
TRAINED SPOTTER AND OFF-DUTY NWS METEOROLOGIST EACH REPORTED 2 INCH DIAMETER HAIL NEAR MILEPOST 195 ON INTERSTATE 25.
POWER OUTAGE AT THIS LOCATION DUE TO STRONG WINDS.
SMALL TREE BRANCHES BLOWN DOWN.
FOUR INCH BRANCHES BLOWN OFF TREE. POSSIBLE STREET SIGN BLOWN DOWN.
KPAT - PATHFINDER HILL
EST FROM ALCOVA MARINA
EST FROM PATHFINDER RESERVOIR MARINA
EST WIND GUST FROM PATHFINDER RESERVOIR MARINA
THUNDERSTORM WIND GUSTS ESTIMATED AT 60 TO 65 MPH.
HEALTHY 3IN DIAMETER TREE LIMBS DOWN IN CASPER AT 10TH AND BEVERLY STREET
HEALTHY 3IN DIAMETER TREE LIMBS DOWN IN CASPER AT 10TH AND BEVERLY STREET
2 LARGE OLD AND HEALTHY TREES WERE UPROOTED. ONE WENT THROUGH A FARM SHOP AND THE OTHER THROUGH A SHED.
*** 3 INJ *** DMG OCCURRED AT JACKSON LAKE LODGE. WINDS BLEW OUT LARGE WINDOWS. BLEW DOWN TREES, POWER POLES AND LARGE PICNIC TABLES. 3 EMPLOYEES SLIGHTLY INJURED

THE FOLLOWING DAMAGE OCCURRED BETWEEN 320 AND 330 PM FROM COLLAPSING SHOWERS. 15-20 POWER POLES DOWN. SEVERAL TREES DOWN. DAMAGE TO A HOUSE AND PATROL CAR FROM DOWNED TREES. A WINDOW BLOWN OUT. FENCE BLOWN DOWN AT THE BLM.
62 MPH WIND GUST RECORDED AT WORLAND AIRPORT FROM A COLLAPSING SHOWER. A 52 MPH WIND GUST WAS ALSO OBSERVED AT THE AIRPORT AT 319 PM.
MOSTLY PENNY SIZED WITH SOME NICKEL TO QUARTER SIZED HAIL MIXED IN.
A BUILDING UNDER CONSTRUCTION WAS KNOCKED DOWN BY STRONG WINDS.
NUMEROUS TREE BRANCHES DOWN. SOME MINOR DAMAGE CAUSED FROM DOWNED LARGE TREE BRANCHES.
BUFFALO ASOS REPORTED A 60 MPH WIND GUST FROM A THUNDERSTORM AT 1559L
EXTENSIVE DAMAGE TO FRONT PORCH AND PART OF ROOF ON HOME DUE TO WINDS.
HAIL RANGED FROM QUARTER TO PING PONG BALL SIZE
OUTFLOW WIND
